chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-1437 of 2022 _______________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability of petition 13.08.2025 Mr. Sandeep Malani, AAG --------- This is an old petition of 2022, which is over 03 years ago. This petition was last taken up on 11.04.2022, which is over 03 years ago and the petitioners were directed to satisfy the Court about maintainability of this petition. In the last 03 years, the petitioners have failed to pursue this old petition diligently and the question of maintainability still remains outstanding. On the last date of hearing over 03 years ago, a counsel held brief on behalf of learned counsel for the petitioners. Today, once-again, none present for the petitioners without intimation. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Head of Const. Benches Judge Nadir*
